mapper.select: SELECT session.id AS session_id, session.patient_id, session.department_id, session.scene_type, session.session_status, session.chief_complaint_summary, session.summary, session.started_at, session.ended_at FROM ai_session session WHERE session.id = #{sessionId} AND session.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT turn.id AS turn_id, turn.turn_no, turn.turn_status, turn.started_at, turn.completed_at, turn.error_code, turn.error_message FROM ai_turn turn WHERE turn.session_id = #{sessionId} AND turn.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY turn.turn_no ASC, turn.id ASC

SELECT content.turn_id, content.content_role, content.content_encrypted, content.created_at FROM ai_turn_content content JOIN ai_turn turn ON turn.id = content.turn_id WHERE turn.session_id = #{sessionId} AND turn.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY turn.turn_no ASC, content.created_at ASC, content.id ASC

SELECT session.id AS session_id, session.patient_id, run.id AS model_run_id, turn.id AS finalized_turn_id, turn.turn_no AS finalized_turn_no, run.completed_at AS finalized_at, ( SELECT latest_turn.turn_no FROM ai_turn latest_turn WHERE latest_turn.session_id = session.id AND latest_turn.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY latest_turn.turn_no DESC, latest_turn.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_turn_no, ( SELECT latest_turn.turn_status FROM ai_turn latest_turn WHERE latest_turn.session_id = session.id AND latest_turn.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY latest_turn.turn_no DESC, latest_turn.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_turn_status, ( SELECT latest_run.run_status FROM ai_model_run latest_run JOIN ai_turn latest_turn ON latest_turn.id = latest_run.turn_id WHERE latest_turn.session_id = session.id AND latest_turn.deleted_at IS NULL AND latest_run.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY latest_turn.turn_no DESC, latest_run.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_run_status, ( SELECT latest_event.event_detail_json FROM ai_guardrail_event latest_event JOIN ai_model_run latest_run ON latest_run.id = latest_event.run_id JOIN ai_turn latest_turn ON latest_turn.id = latest_run.turn_id WHERE latest_turn.session_id = session.id AND latest_turn.deleted_at IS NULL AND latest_run.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY latest_turn.turn_no DESC, latest_run.id DESC, latest_event.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_event_detail_json, event.risk_level, event.action_taken AS guardrail_action, run.triage_snapshot_json FROM ai_session session JOIN ai_turn turn ON turn.session_id = session.id JOIN ai_model_run run ON run.turn_id = turn.id JOIN ai_guardrail_event event ON event.run_id = run.id WHERE session.id = #{sessionId} AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND turn.deleted_at IS NULL AND run.deleted_at IS NULL AND turn.turn_status = 'COMPLETED' AND run.run_status = 'SUCCEEDED' AND run.triage_snapshot_json IS NOT NULL ORDER BY turn.turn_no DESC, run.completed_at DESC, run.id DESC, event.occurred_at DESC, event.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT chunk_id, retrieval_rank, fusion_score, snippet FROM ai_run_citation WHERE model_run_id = #{modelRunId} ORDER BY retrieval_rank ASC, id ASC

SELECT latest_event.event_detail_json FROM ai_guardrail_event latest_event JOIN ai_model_run latest_run ON latest_run.id = latest_event.run_id JOIN ai_turn latest_turn ON latest_turn.id = latest_run.turn_id JOIN ai_session session ON session.id = latest_turn.session_id WHERE session.id = #{sessionId} AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND latest_turn.deleted_at IS NULL AND latest_run.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY latest_turn.turn_no DESC, latest_run.id DESC, latest_event.id DESC LIMIT 1
